title: Incorrect result when an index is used for an ordered join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b INT NOT NULL CHECK(b >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2(x INT, y VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default');
SELECT y FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON a = x WHERE b <= CAST(y AS INT) ORDER BY b DESC;
key_bug_features: Index usage alters results in ordered join queries
